entries.result: A handful of rusty copper coins and a chipped dagger. Barely worth the pocket lint.
A worn leather pouch containing a few copper coins and a rusty iron key.
A small bag of mixed copper and silver coins jingles with modest weight.
A dented tankard and a half-burnt candle stub. Someone's lost dinner supplies.
A small leather pouch containing a few silver coins and a tarnished silver locket with a portrait inside.
A merchant's ledger filled with coded entries and a hidden compartment containing a gold coin.
An ornate quill and inkwell set made of polished obsidian, worth something to a collector.
A semi-precious gemstone (garnet or turquoise) wrapped in stained cloth.
A scroll case containing a spell scroll (single-use, random minor spell).
A torn map fragment showing a hidden location marked with a blood-red 'X'.
A finely crafted elven shortsword with faintly glowing runes along the blade.
A potion of healing in a crystal vial, shimmering with a soft golden light.
A ring of minor protection — a simple silver band that feels unnaturally warm.
A small bag of holding containing a random assortment of previous owner's belongings.
A mysterious crystal that pulses with a soft inner light and hums faintly.
A dragon-scale cloak, light as silk but tough as leather, shimmering with iridescent colours.
A legendary amulet of the lost dwarf-king, pulsing with ancient power and etched with dwarven runes of kingship.
